name: @memberjunction/ai-bridge-slack
description: MemberJunction: Slack huddle Realtime Bridge driver. Connects the realtime agent engine to a Slack huddle (audio + video + screen in/out, diarized roster, participant mute, huddle/thread chat) via an injectable Slack huddle SDK seam, and contributes a Meeting Controls facilitator channel. NOTE: the huddle MEDIA API is the gating unknown — Slack does not publicly document a bot-join-with-media path for huddles (a Chime-level integration may be required); production binding requires verifying/obtaining huddle media access.
author: MemberJunction.com
